title: Product Catalog, Categories, Blog, Meilisearch indexing
description:
Реализовать:
1. backend/app/api/v1/products/ — list (cursor pagination), get by slug, categories
2. backend/app/api/v1/blog/ — list, get by slug, create, update, delete
3. backend/app/integrations/meilisearch.py — MeilisearchClient
4. backend/app/tasks/search_index.py — Celery task для индексации products + blog
5. Migrations для новых полей (если есть)
6. Unit-тесты для products + blog service
